reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve and display authenticated username "yiw190" after account access was granted.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Super Agent application with three agents listed in the sidebar.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260424-163538-87o9" in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing the agent is in "idle" status, which satisfies the requirement.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle", meeting the requirement.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was successfully submitted to the agent.
Account access card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — A card titled "Account Access Request" displayed with GitHub account already selected (checked).
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Permission was granted and agent proceeded to execute the GitHub tool.
Agent displayed an "API Request Review" card asking to allow GitHub GET /user request — Clicked the "Allow" button, selected "Allow Once" option to permit the API call.
Waited for agent to complete processing (1 minute 9 seconds, within 4-minute limit) — Agent processed the GitHub tool request and returned the authenticated user information.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Final response displays: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Successfully meeting the verification requirement.
Took final screenshot showing complete result — Screenshot captured showing the full conversation with the GitHub username prominently displayed in the agent's response.
